title: Melting Fast
lines: You approach the massive block of ice. The blistering heat from the ceiling is causing it to melt into a rapidly spreading puddle.
Through the frosty surface, you can see a heavy metallic hatch set into the floor beneath it.
You need to smash the ice covering the hatch before you cook to death, but your hands aren't strong enough.

options.desc: Smash the ice with the heavy metal rod!
Go back and look for something to smash it with...
